context: slideTypeVocab.decorate() throws Error('Method not implemented.') — deciding whether to fix or leave it
choice: Leave it unfixed in this epic
rationale: vocab decomposes into MC child slides at runtime; in the Vue rendering path the Vocab instance's decorate() is never called — the MC components own all visual state. Fix would be a no-op.
alternatives: Fix by implementing decorate() as a no-op stub
Fix by delegating to MC child decorate()

context: mobile-drag-drop polyfill in package.json — deciding whether to remove it with the gap conversion
choice: Remove mobile-drag-drop when GapExercise.vue is wired (T-150)
rationale: SortableJS (via vue-draggable-plus) handles mobile touch natively including cross-list DnD. The polyfill was only needed because the old gap used HTML5 native drag-drop which has poor mobile support.

context: imap SVG injection: keep @tanem/svg-injector or replace with native fetch + v-html
rationale: @tanem/svg-injector: zero new code, already a dependency, well-tested. Native fetch + v-html: removes a dependency, fewer moving parts, but requires ~10 lines of fetch/parse code. Either works correctly from onMounted.
